title: Are automated notifications recorded somewhere?
excerpt: I have several automations that notify people. However, I do not see those notifications in the Update section. Are automatic notifications recorded somewhere else? How can I prove that the notification was sent?

posts.author: DrGerry (Gerald)
posts.cookedHtml: I have several automations that notify people. However, I do not see those notifications in the Update section. Are automatic notifications recorded somewhere else? How can I prove that the notification was sent?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Gerald,

In order to view the automated notifications that aren’t recorded in the updates section, you can check on the run history via the automations centre:

Screen Shot 2024-02-15 at 2.17.30 pm762×260 12.6 KB

Does this help?

posts.author: DrGerry (Gerald)
posts.cookedHtml:
In Run History I see where it happened, but I don’t see the actual message with time stamp. This is not good . . .

Someone could say “I never got the notification”, now what? How do we prove it was sent, at what time, and to whom?
